creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
Seems that I can start over manually in that src dir with 
a make distclean and then with CC env var and CFLAGS : 

titan# env | sort 
BLOCKSIZE=K
CC=/usr/local/bin/gcc7
CFLAGS=-O0 -g -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib
COLUMNS=118
EDITOR=/usr/bin/vi
GROUP=wheel
HOME=/root
HOST=titan
HOSTTYPE=FreeBSD

LINES=43

OSTYPE=FreeBSD
PAGER=/usr/bin/more
PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin
PWD=/usr/ports/x11/xcb-util-renderutil/work/xcb-util-renderutil-0.3.9
REMOTEHOST=172.16.35.3
SHELL=/bin/csh
SHLVL=1
TERM=xterm
TERMCAP=xterm|X11 terminal emulator:@7=\EOF:@8=\EOM:F1=\E[23~:F2=\E[24~:K2=\EOE:Km=\E[M:k1=\EOP:k2=\EOQ:k3=\EOR:k4=\EOS:k5=\E[15~:k6=\E[17~:k7=\E[18~:k8=\E[19~:k9=\E[20~:k;=\E[21~:kI=\E[2~:kN=\E[6~:kP=\E[5~:kd=\EOB:kh=\EOH:kl=\EOD:kr=\EOC:ku=\EOA:am:bs:km:mi:ms:ut:xn:AX:Co#8:co#118:kn#12:li#43:pa#64:AB=\E[4%dm:AF=\E[3%dm:AL=\E[%dL:DC=\E[%dP:DL=\E[%dM:DO=\E[%dB:LE=\E[%dD:RI=\E[%dC:UP=\E[%dA:ae=\E(B:al=\E[L:as=\E(0:bl=^G:cd=\E[J:ce=\E[K:cl=\E[H\E[2J:cm=\E[%i%d;%dH:cs=\E[%i%d;%dr:ct=\E[3g:dc=\E[P:dl=\E[M:ei=\E[4l:ho=\E[H:im=\E[4h:is=\E[!p\E[?3;4l\E[4l\E>:kD=\E[3~:kb=^H:ke=\E[?1l\E>:ks=\E[?1h\E=:kB=\E[Z:le=^H:md=\E[1m:me=\E[m:ml=\El:mr=\E[7m:mu=\Em:nd=\E[C:op=\E[39;49m:rc=\E8:rs=\E[!p\E[?3;4l\E[4l\E>:sc=\E7:se=\E[27m:sf=^J:so=\E[7m:sr=\EM:st=\EH:ue=\E[24m:up=\E[A:us=\E[4m:ve=\E[?12l\E[?25h:vi=\E[?25l:vs=\E[?12;25h:
TMPDIR=/var/tmp/root
USER=root
VENDOR=amd
VISUAL=/usr/bin/vi

So at this point I would think make install should be okay :

So why the fail from my attempted build of virtualbox-ose ? 

Dennis
